title: epilobium tetragonum subsp. obscurum
intro: Epilobium tetragonum subsp. obscurum, also known as the triangular willowherb or three-toothed willowherb, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties attributed to its high concentration of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, which can help to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. The health benefits of Epilobium tetragonum subsp. obscurum include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce bleeding and inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment for any health condition.
